enumNaNValues.ts(13,7): error TS2322: Type 'F' is not assignable to type 'E'.


==== enumNaNValues.ts (1 errors) ====
    enum E {
      A = NaN,
      B = NaN,
    }
    
    const a: E.A = E.B;
    const b: E.B = E.A;
    
    enum F {
      X = NaN,
    }
    
    const c: E.A = F.X; // Error expected - different enums
          ~
!!! error TS2322: Type 'F' is not assignable to type 'E'.
